cards.back: The principle of collecting and processing only the minimum amount of personal data necessary to achieve the specified purpose
A process where organizations design their systems and processes with data protection in mind, from the outset
An individual whose personal data is being processed by an organization
An organization that determines the purposes for which personal data is processed and is responsible for its processing
An organization that processes personal data on behalf of the data controller, but is not responsible for determining the purposes for which it is processed
